label: Appointment Pak
blurb: Personal Care, Wellness & Salon Ops. Minimizes no-shows and automates client relationships.

skills.label: Fitness Client Checkin Nag
skills.method: Identifies personal training clients who haven't logged a workout or visited the gym in 14 days, sending a personalized "checking in on your goals" SMS.

skills.label: Client Birthday Promo Sender
skills.method: Scans the booking software daily, texting clients a "15% off a blowout" coupon exactly 7 days before their birthday.

skills.label: No Show Fee Collector
skills.method: When an appointment is marked "missed," automatically drafts a polite but firm text and charges the 50% cancellation fee via Stripe.
trigger_examples: protects independent contractors from lost hourly wages

skills.label: Yoga Class Waitlist Promoter
skills.method: When a student cancels their 6 AM spot at 10 PM, instantly texts the first person on the waitlist with a "Reply Y to claim" trigger.

skills.label: Local Cross Promo Matcher
skills.method: Identifies clients booking "bridal hair" and automatically emails them a referral discount for a partnered local makeup artist or florist.
trigger_examples: builds local b2b lead generation networks

skills.label: Salon Formula History Tracker
skills.method: Transcribes a stylist's voice memo ("Jane got 2 parts 6N, 1 part 7A, 20 volume") and logs it perfectly into the client's file for their next root touch-up.
trigger_examples: replaces messy index cards and guarantees consistent results

skills.label: Spa Inventory Backbar Tracker
skills.method: Deducts ounces of shampoo/lotion based on the day's completed service menu, alerting the owner to order more backbar supplies before they run out.
trigger_examples: stops estheticians from running to the store mid-shift

skills.label: Pet Vaccine Record Verifier
skills.method: Parses uploaded PDF vet records to ensure Rabies and Bordetella are up-to-date before confirming a dog grooming or boarding appointment.

skills.label: Booth Renter Commission Splitter
skills.method: Calculates daily salon product sales, splitting the revenue between the house and the independent stylist based on their specific contract tier.

skills.label: Massage Intake Form Parser
skills.method: Scans new client digital intake forms, flagging contraindications (e.g., "pregnant" or "recent surgery") in red for the therapist before they enter the room.
trigger_examples: reduces liability and ensures client safety
